name: existing-test-patterns
description: Test files exist for contexts (AuthContext.test.tsx, DomainProvider.test.tsx, EnvironmentContext.test.tsx) and pages (AuthDemoPage.test.tsx, TeamsDemoPage.test.tsx). Use @testing-library/react with happy-dom. Pattern: render component, verify elements, simulate interactions.
recommendation: New page should have FeatureControlPlanePage.test.tsx following existing patterns.
